channel.title: Security on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Security on Arrans github.io

item.title: trimstray/the-book-of-secret-knowledge
item.description: A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.

item.title: simplex-chat/simplex-chat
item.description: SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS, Android and desktop apps 📱!

item.title: Lissy93/awesome-privacy
item.description: 🦄 A curated list of privacy & security-focused software and services

item.title: gravitational/teleport
item.description: The easiest, and most secure way to access and protect all of your infrastructure.

item.title: eosphoros-ai/DB-GPT
item.description: open-source agentic AI data assistant for the next generation of AI + Data products.

item.title: zizmorcore/zizmor
item.description: Static analysis for GitHub Actions

item.title: swisskyrepo/PayloadsAllTheThings
item.description: A list of useful payloads and bypass for Web Application Security and Pentest/CTF

item.title: getsops/sops
item.description: Simple and flexible tool for managing secrets

item.title: fleetdm/fleet
item.description: Open device management

item.title: GyulyVGC/sniffnet
item.description: Comfortably monitor your Internet traffic 🕵️‍♂️

item.title: HotCakeX/Harden-Windows-Security
item.description: Harden Windows Safely, Securely using Official Supported Microsoft methods and proper explanation | Always up-to-date and works with the latest build of Windows | Provides tools and Guides for Personal, Enterprise, Government and Military security levels | SLSA Level 3 Compliant for Secure Development and Build Process | Apps Available on MS Store✨

item.title: Infisical/infisical
item.description: Infisical is the open-source platform for secrets, certificates, and privileged access management.

item.title: go-acme/lego
item.description: Let’s Encrypt/ACME client and library written in Go

item.title: OpenCTI-Platform/opencti
item.description: Open Cyber Threat Intelligence Platform

item.title: trimstray/test-your-sysadmin-skills
item.description: A collection of Linux Sysadmin Test Questions and Answers. Test your knowledge and skills in different fields with these Q/A.

item.title: nginx/nginx
item.description: The official NGINX Open Source repository.

item.title: authelia/authelia
item.description: The Single Sign-On Multi-Factor portal for web apps, now OpenID Certified™

item.title: passbolt/passbolt_api
item.description: Passbolt Community Edition (CE) API. The JSON API for the open source password manager for teams!

item.title: Zouuup/landrun
item.description: Run any Linux process in a secure, unprivileged sandbox using Landlock. Think firejail, but lightweight, user-friendly, and baked into the kernel.

item.title: Koukobin/Ermis
item.description: Ermis: A decentralized, secure and open-source messaging platform for real-time communication.

item.title: FallibleInc/security-guide-for-developers
item.description: Security Guide for Developers

item.title: voidauth/voidauth
item.description: Single Sign-On for Your Self-Hosted Universe

item.title: keeweb/keeweb
item.description: Free cross-platform password manager compatible with KeePass

item.title: openziti/zrok
item.description: Secure internet sharing made simple.

item.title: sigstore/model-transparency
item.description: Supply chain security for ML

item.title: 0x4D31/awesome-threat-detection
item.description: ✨ A curated list of awesome threat detection and hunting resources 🕵️‍♂️

item.title: authpass/authpass
item.description: AuthPass - Password Manager based on Flutter for all platforms. Keepass 2.x (KDBX 3 and KDBX 4) compatible.

item.title: cncf/tag-security
item.description: 🔐CNCF Security Technical Advisory Group – secure access, policy control, privacy, auditing, explainability and more!

item.title: moul/sshportal
item.description: 🎩 simple, fun and transparent SSH (and telnet) bastion server

item.title: Picocrypt/Picocrypt
item.description: A very small, very simple, yet very secure encryption tool.

item.title: OWASP/API-Security
item.description: OWASP API Security Project

item.title: Authula/authula
item.description: An open-source authentication solution that scales with you. Embed it as a library in your Go app, or run it as a standalone auth server with any tech stack.

item.title: dedene/claw-wrap
item.description: A secure credential proxy for CLI tools. Executes tools with secrets on behalf of sandboxed processes - credentials never enter the sandbox.

item.title: padok-team/yatas
item.description: 🦉🔎 A simple tool to audit your AWS/GCP infrastructure for misconfiguration or potential security issues with plugins integration

item.title: algorismo-au/lanekeep
item.description: Governance guardrails and insights for AI coding agents

item.title: keshav-space/safenotes
item.description: Safe Notes is a security project aimed at providing an encrypted, private note manager that works locally and protects notes from various threat actors.

item.title: SoWeBegin/ToyBattlesHQ
item.description: ToyBattlesHQ serves as the central public repository for the server used by ToyBattles - the first (ever!) open-source server emulator for MicroVolts.

item.title: linux-application-whitelisting/fapolicyd
item.description: File Access Policy Daemon
